After rejection, Kavya felt low but resumed control by building a feedback log. Ira reframed the setback as actionable data and supported emotional recovery. Kavya celebrated a Jaipur pilot order and credited the routine they built together. Ira reinforced the long-term value of embodied self-regulation.
